𝘏𝘰𝘸 𝘮𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘭𝘰𝘯𝘨𝘦𝘳 𝘮𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘩𝘦 𝘣𝘦 𝘧𝘰𝘳𝘤𝘦𝘥 𝘵𝘰 𝘪𝘯𝘥𝘶𝘭𝘨𝘦 𝘪𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘴𝘪𝘤𝘬 𝘢𝘯𝘵𝘪𝘤𝘴? 𝘊𝘢𝘯'𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘴𝘦𝘦 𝘩𝘦'𝘴 𝘣𝘶𝘴𝘺?

𝘉𝘶𝘵 𝘭𝘦𝘵'𝘴 𝘣𝘦 𝘩𝘰𝘯𝘦𝘴𝘵, 𝘩𝘦'𝘴 𝘦𝘯𝘫𝘰𝘺𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘩𝘪𝘮𝘴𝘦𝘭𝘧 𝘵𝘰𝘰... 𝘮𝘢𝘺𝘣𝘦 𝘮𝘰𝘳𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘢𝘯 𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘢𝘳𝘦.

𝘏𝘦'𝘥 𝘯𝘦𝘷𝘦𝘳 𝘢𝘥𝘮𝘪𝘵 𝘴𝘶𝘤𝘩 𝘢 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨.

so I'm still new to bot creation, and especially smut scenarios. no shame in trying and seeing what works :)

there is hardly any plot, this is filth yet again.

the two of u are colleagues with benefits and you provoke him because you're a horny animal (this is self indulgent to a T my friends).

AUGUST 18TH 2024: slightly edited.

not much changing here. fixing his personality a bit.

AI will always have problems!

Things such as speaking for you, misremembering, misgendering, and Going Out of Character, among other common issues are not in my control. It is your responsibility to tweak the bot to your liking.

ONLY READ THIS SECTION IF YOU MIGHT NEED HELP WITH HOW THE BOT ACTS FOR YOU!! ITS OTHERWISE IRRELEVANT!!!

Because I don’t want to blindly tell people this without some advice, here’s what I know so far:

I would highly suggest searching for advanced prompts. Here’s one I use for JLLM:

kolach's prompts

Update your persona. If it has a lot of words(tokens) this can screw a bot up. Too much information. Give it necessary information such as your Sex, Name, brief Appearance (in my experience calling yourself ‘chubby’ or ‘petite’ can also POSSIBLY lead to it
